name: Web Access（浏览器自动化）
examples_zh: 搜索并对比三个竞品产品的功能特点
帮我查看小红书上关于这个话题的热门内容
登录后台导出本月报表数据
examples_en: Search and compare features of three competing products
Browse Xiaohongshu for trending content on this topic
Log into the admin dashboard and export this month's report
description_zh: CDP 直连本地 Chrome，智能调度联网工具，支持登录态、并行批量操作
description_en: CDP-based web access: search, scrape, login-aware browsing, parallel ops
